name: Obsidian
description: Markdown-based knowledge base with bidirectional links, graph view, and a huge plugin ecosystem. Local-first.

name: Notion
description: All-in-one workspace combining notes, databases, kanban boards, wikis, and calendars.

name: Logseq
description: Open-source outliner and knowledge graph. Markdown/Org-mode based, local-first, with bidirectional links.

name: Roam Research
description: Networked thought tool that pioneered bidirectional linking in note-taking. Block-level references.

name: Apple Notes
description: Apple's built-in note app. Syncs via iCloud, supports folders, tags, sketches, and document scanning.

name: Microsoft OneNote
description: Free-form digital notebook by Microsoft. Sections, pages, drawing, and deep Office integration.

name: Joplin
description: Open-source note-taking app with Markdown support, encryption, and sync to your own cloud storage.

name: Standard Notes
description: Encrypted note-taking app focused on longevity and privacy. Markdown, extensions, and 100% open source.

name: Craft
description: Native note-taking app for Apple platforms with rich documents, backlinks, and beautiful block-based editing.

name: Bear
description: Beautiful Markdown note app for Apple devices. Nested tags, focus mode, and a clean writing experience.

name: Anytype
description: Local-first, peer-to-peer knowledge tool. Object-based data model with types, relations, and offline sync.

name: Thunderbird
description: Free, open-source email client by Mozilla. Supports IMAP/POP3, calendar, contacts, and extensions.

name: Microsoft Outlook
description: Microsoft's email and calendar client. Deep Exchange/Microsoft 365 integration and rich rule system.

name: Apple Mail
description: Apple's built-in email client. Clean, reliable, and tightly integrated with macOS and iOS.

name: Spark
description: Smart email client with AI triage, team collaboration, and a clean interface across all platforms.

name: Superhuman
description: Premium email client built for speed. Keyboard-driven, AI triage, and read status tracking.

name: Proton Mail
description: End-to-end encrypted email from Switzerland. Privacy-focused with no ads and zero-access encryption.

name: eM Client
description: Full-featured email client for Windows and Mac with calendar, contacts, tasks, and chat. PGP encryption support.

name: Mailspring
description: Open-source email client with read receipts, link tracking, and snooze. Fast search and unified inbox.

name: Total Commander
description: Dual-pane file manager for Windows with built-in FTP, archive handling, and batch rename.

name: Double Commander
description: Free, open-source dual-pane file manager inspired by Total Commander. Cross-platform.

name: nnn
description: Blazing fast terminal file manager. Tiny, virtually zero-config, with plugins for extended functionality.

name: ranger
description: Terminal file manager with Vim keybindings, file previews, and a column-based navigation.

name: Dolphin
description: KDE's default file manager. Tabbed browsing, split view, integrated terminal, and rich file previews.

name: Thunar
description: Lightweight file manager for Xfce. Fast startup, bulk rename, and custom actions for power users.

name: Midnight Commander
description: Terminal-based dual-pane file manager with built-in editor, FTP client, and archive browsing.

name: Files
description: Modern file manager for Windows with tabs, columns view, and a clean fluent design. Open-source community project.

name: Dropbox
description: Cloud file storage and sync. Simple, reliable, with selective sync and file sharing.

name: Google Drive
description: Google's cloud storage. 15GB free, deep integration with Google Docs/Sheets/Slides.

name: OneDrive
description: Microsoft's cloud storage. Built into Windows, integrates with Office 365 and SharePoint.

name: iCloud Drive
description: Apple's cloud storage. Seamless sync across Apple devices, integrated into Finder and Files app.

name: Sync.com
description: Zero-knowledge encrypted cloud storage. Privacy-focused alternative to Dropbox with end-to-end encryption.

name: Box
description: Enterprise cloud storage and collaboration platform. Content management, workflow automation, and governance controls.

name: Icedrive
description: Cloud storage with a virtual drive feature. Zero-knowledge encryption, clean UI, and lifetime plan option.

name: 1Password
description: Password manager with vaults, secure sharing, Watchtower breach alerts, and passkey support.

name: Bitwarden
description: Open-source password manager. Self-hostable, generous free tier, and strong security audit history.

name: KeePassXC
description: Free, offline password manager. Local encrypted database, browser integration, TOTP support.

name: Dashlane
description: Password manager with built-in VPN, dark web monitoring, and automatic password changer.

name: Adobe Acrobat
description: The standard PDF editor. Create, edit, sign, annotate, and convert PDFs. Invented the format.

name: Sumatra PDF
description: Fast, minimalist PDF reader for Windows. Also opens EPUB, MOBI, and comic book formats.

name: Okular
description: Free, open-source document viewer by KDE. Supports PDF, EPUB, and many other formats with annotations.

name: Foxit PDF Editor
description: Full-featured PDF editor and reader. Collaborative editing, forms, signatures, and cloud integration.

name: PDF-XChange Editor
description: Feature-rich PDF viewer and editor for Windows. OCR, annotations, stamps, and form filling.

name: Smallpdf
description: Online PDF toolkit. Compress, convert, merge, split, sign, and edit PDFs in the browser.

name: Stirling PDF
description: Self-hosted PDF manipulation tool. Merge, split, convert, compress, and OCR PDFs via a web interface.

name: Zathura
description: Minimalist PDF and document viewer with Vim-like keybindings. Fast, keyboard-driven, and plugin-extensible.

name: PDF Expert
description: Fast, polished PDF editor for Apple platforms. Annotate, edit text, fill forms, and sign documents.

name: Sejda
description: Online and desktop PDF editor. Edit text, merge, split, compress, and convert PDFs with a simple interface.

name: LibreOffice
description: Free, open-source office suite with Writer, Calc, Impress, Draw, and Base. The top MS Office alternative.

name: Microsoft Office
description: The industry-standard office suite. Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and more. Available as desktop apps or Microsoft 365.

name: Google Docs
description: Free web-based office suite. Docs, Sheets, and Slides with real-time collaboration and Google Drive integration.

name: ONLYOFFICE
description: Open-source office suite with high MS Office compatibility. Self-hostable with real-time collaboration.

name: Apple iWork
description: Apple's free office suite: Pages, Numbers, and Keynote. Clean design and tight Apple ecosystem integration.

name: Calligra Suite
description: Free, open-source office suite by KDE. Includes Words, Sheets, Stage, and the Krita painting app.

name: WPS Office
description: Lightweight office suite with strong MS Office compatibility. Free tier with PDF tools and cloud storage.

name: Zoho WorkDrive
description: Cloud-based office and document management suite. Writer, Sheet, and Show with team collaboration and storage.

name: SoftMaker Office
description: Desktop office suite with excellent MS Office compatibility. TextMaker, PlanMaker, and Presentations. One-time purchase.

name: Polaris Office
description: Cross-platform office suite with MS Office file support, cloud sync, and PDF editing. Free for personal use.

name: Google Calendar
description: Web-based calendar with event scheduling, reminders, and integration with Gmail and Google Meet.

name: Fantastical
description: Calendar app for Apple platforms with natural language input, weather integration, and conference call detection.

name: Calendly
description: Scheduling automation platform. Share your availability, let others book meetings, and eliminate back-and-forth emails.

name: Cal.com
description: Open-source scheduling platform. Self-hostable alternative to Calendly with team scheduling and workflow automation.

name: Notion Calendar
description: Calendar app that connects to Notion databases. Unified view of events and tasks with time-blocking support.

name: Reclaim.ai
description: AI scheduling assistant that auto-schedules tasks, habits, and meetings around your existing calendar.

name: Morgen
description: Calendar and scheduling app that unifies multiple calendars. Task integration, time-blocking, and scheduling links.

name: Sphinx
description: Documentation generator for Python projects. reStructuredText-based with cross-referencing, search, and multiple output formats.

name: MkDocs
description: Static site generator for project documentation. Markdown-based with themes, search, and easy deployment.

name: Storybook
description: UI component workshop for building, testing, and documenting components in isolation. Works with React, Vue, Angular, and more.

name: Read the Docs
description: Documentation hosting platform that builds and publishes docs from repositories. Free for open-source projects.

name: GitBook
description: Documentation platform with Git-backed content, collaborative editing, and published docs with built-in search.

name: VitePress
description: Vite-powered static site generator for documentation. Markdown with Vue components, fast builds, and a clean default theme.

name: Confluence
description: Team wiki and documentation platform by Atlassian. Spaces, page trees, templates, and deep Jira integration.

name: BookStack
description: Free, open-source wiki platform with a book/chapter/page hierarchy. Self-hosted, WYSIWYG and Markdown editors.

name: Outline
description: Open-source knowledge base and wiki. Markdown editing, nested documents, and Slack/API integrations.

name: Swagger UI
description: Interactive API documentation from OpenAPI specs. Try-out requests directly in the browser with auto-generated docs.

name: TypeDoc
description: Documentation generator for TypeScript projects. Converts TSDoc comments into HTML or JSON documentation.

name: Substack
description: Newsletter and blogging platform with built-in subscriptions, payments, and podcasting. Popular with independent writers.

name: Medium
description: Online publishing platform with a large built-in audience. Clean reading experience and partner program for monetization.

name: Hashnode
description: Blogging platform for developers. Custom domain, Markdown editor, and automatic backup to GitHub.

name: Dev.to
description: Community-driven developer blogging platform. Open-source, Markdown-based, with tags, comments, and reactions.

name: Buttondown
description: Minimalist newsletter platform with Markdown editing, subscriber management, analytics, and API access.

name: Beehiiv
description: Newsletter platform built by early Morning Brew team. Growth tools, ad network, referral programs, and analytics.

name: Kit (ConvertKit)
description: Email marketing platform for creators. Visual automations, landing pages, and paid newsletter support.

name: Write.as
description: Minimalist blogging platform focused on writing. Anonymous publishing, ActivityPub federation, and no ads.
